name: Lemon-Oatmeal Crispies
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons Dried Lemon Peel, Grated or Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the vegetable oil and brown sugar. Mix at medium speed until creamy.
2. Add egg whites, lemon juice, lemon peel (grated or finely chopped), and lemon flavoring. Mix at medium speed to blend well.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, rolled oats, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the creamy mixture while continuing to beat at medium speed.
5. Stir in the crispy rice cereal.
6. Drop tablespoonfuls (level teaspoonfuls) of the batter onto ungreased or foil-lined cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the cookies are lightly browned.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack to room temperature.
Yield: 36 servings (36 cookies)
Food Exchanges per serving: 2/3 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 87, CHO: 11g, PRO: 1g, Fat: 4g, Na: 66mg, Cholesterol: 0
